Help

What This Report Shows

webdiskstat turns a gdu or ncdu scan into a static disk usage report. The left panel lists entries in the current directory. The treemap shows the same directory visually by size, including nested contents inside larger directory tiles when space allows.

Directory List

  • Double-click a directory to enter it.
  • Use the column headers to sort by name, items, files, size, or modified date.
  • Use the column settings button next to the Name header to show or hide optional columns.

Treemap

  • Larger directory tiles show subdirectories and files inside them when space allows.
  • Directories show up to the selected Max Tiles Depth entries before grouping additional entries as smaller entries.
  • Double-click a directory tile to enter it.

Home View

  • Choose 10 to 50 biggest files from the list menu.
  • Drag the divider between the treemap and biggest-files list to resize the home panes.
  • Double-click a listed file to jump to the directory containing it.

Navigation

  • Use the breadcrumb path at the top to jump to a parent directory.
  • Use the search box to jump directly to files or directories anywhere in the report.
  • Drag the divider between the directory list and right panel to resize the right panel.
  • Use the parent button next to the Name column header to go up one directory.

Keyboard

Up / DownMove selection in the list.
Page Up / Page DownMove selection by one visible page.
Home / EndJump to the first or last item.
/ / Ctrl+FFocus global search.
n / s / C / M/mSort by name, size, file count, or modified time.
Enter / RightEnter the selected directory.
Backspace / LeftGo up one directory.
?Open this help page.
